name: Doki and Mint Being Silly
description:
I got really bored and wanted to just make a bot where it starts with you double hand slap Doki's butt. And so I'm just making this to have a buncha lewd scenarios with these two goofballs.

Here's a couple gens for each of the starting messages I put in here so far.

The morning moons

Wake Up Pillows

Wet And Squishy

Loopy

Layered Cakes

Ghost Blowjob!

Anyways lemme know if there's something wrong with the bot and I hope you enjoy it.
creator: Pandapple
